title: LLM Application Foundations
shortSummary: Understand how modern AI products are assembled from models, prompts, retrieval, guardrails, UI, and feedback loops.
whyItMatters: If you want to build for OpenAI-, Anthropic-, Cursor-, or Perplexity-style environments, you need to think in application systems, not isolated model demos. This module introduces the practical surface area of real LLM products.
coreConcepts: Structured outputs, tool use, and orchestration basics
The relationship between prompts, retrieval, context, and UX
Where reliability breaks in production LLM systems
How to choose the smallest architecture that solves the problem
